mapper.sql: ID, TENANT_ID, USERNAME, DISPLAY_NAME, EMAIL, PHONE, PASSWORD_HASH, PASSWORD_CHANGED_AT, STATUS, ACCOUNT_LOCKED, LOCKED_AT, VERSION, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, DELETED_AT
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM M_USER WHERE ID = #{id} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL

SELECT
FROM M_USER WHERE USERNAME = #{username} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL

SELECT
FROM M_USER WHERE EMAIL = #{email} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL

SELECT
FROM M_USER WHERE PHONE = #{phone} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_USER ( TENANT_ID, USERNAME, DISPLAY_NAME, EMAIL, PHONE, PASSWORD_HASH, PASSWORD_CHANGED_AT, STATUS, ACCOUNT_LOCKED, VERSION, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{username}, #{displayName}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{passwordHash}, #{passwordChangedAt}, #{status}, #{accountLocked}, #{version}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE M_USER SET USERNAME = #{username}, DISPLAY_NAME = #{displayName}, EMAIL = #{email}, PHONE = #{phone}, PASSWORD_HASH = #{passwordHash}, PASSWORD_CHANGED_AT = #{passwordChangedAt}, STATUS = #{status}, VERSION = VERSION + 1, UPDATED_AT = #{updatedAt} WHERE ID = #{id} AND VERSION = #{version} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
UPDATE M_USER SET STATUS = #{status}, VERSION = VERSION + 1, UPDATED_AT = #{updatedAt} WHERE ID = #{id} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
UPDATE M_USER SET ACCOUNT_LOCKED = #{locked}, LOCKED_AT = #{lockedAt}, VERSION = VERSION + 1, UPDATED_AT = #{updatedAt} WHERE ID = #{id} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
UPDATE M_USER SET DELETED_AT = #{deletedAt}, VERSION = VERSION + 1, UPDATED_AT = #{updatedAt} WHERE ID = #{id} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
